# Agents - read first, do not edit this file

This is a personal fun project for Jony: an Electron app that wraps streaming
services he is logged into, with channel zapping on top. It is not a product.

Planning sessions (Jony + a frontier model) own scope and architecture.
Execution agents (openclaw ticks) fix bugs and finish tasks Jony asked for.

Hard rules for execution agents:

1. **No torrent, Stremio, Torrentio, or stream-scraping code - ever.** This
   was removed on 2026-06-10 and must not come back in any form.
2. **No DRM workarounds or bypasses.** If a service refuses to play inside the
   webview, report it in a note; do not engineer around content protection.
3. Keep the webview-per-channel architecture. Architecture changes need a
   planning session.
4. No releases, marketing, landing pages, or distribution work without an
   explicit instruction from Jony.
5. If blocked or a task seems to require breaking rules 1-4: STOP, append a
   note to INBOX.md (create if missing), and move on.
